en.hero_subtitle: The next-generation AI-powered community token on Solana
en.wallet_desc: Download Solflare wallet - the recommended wallet for EACO
en.sec_1: Never share your seed phrase with anyone
en.sec_2: Only use official links (check CA carefully)
en.sec_4: Always verify contract address before trading
en.step1_desc: Download Solflare from the official website. Create a new wallet and securely backup your 12-word seed phrase. Never share it with anyone!
en.step2_desc: You need SOL for gas fees. Reserve at least 0.05 SOL for transactions. Buy SOL from any major exchange and transfer to your Solflare wallet.
en.step3_desc: Go to OrbMarkets or use Solflare's built-in Swap. Search for EACO contract address: DqfoyZH96RnvZusSp3Cdncjpyp3C74ZmJzGhjmHnDHRH. Always double-check the CA!
en.step4_desc: Use Solflare's built-in DEX swap or OrbMarkets to trade EACO. Consider staking for monthly consensus rewards up to 2x multiplier!
en.step5_desc: Join our global community! Participate in daily check-ins, promotions, and earn points. Top contributors get airdrop eligibility!
en.tip_1: Reserve 0.05 SOL for gas fees always
en.tip_2: Use Solflare's built-in Swap for best rates
en.tip_4: Join monthly consensus program for 2x staking rewards
en.footer_text: Updated: 2026-07-16 | EACO Community - Built for Global Adoption

es.tip_2: Usa el Swap de Solflare para mejores tasas
